calendar.matters:
HEARING ON JUSTIN JAMES DOLLIVER'S PETITION FOR RECOGNITION OF CHAGE OF GENDER AND SEX IDENTIFIER, CHANGE OF NAME, AND ISSUANCE OF NEW CERTIFICATES

Off Calendar Mar-26-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The matter came on for Change of name and gender of Petitioner David Lemar Jackson.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:21pm to 2:30pm.

Petitioner Justin James Dolliver appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.

Petition for change of name and gender filed December 5, 2024.

Order to show cause filed December 5, 2024.

Notice of hearing filed March 12, 2025.

The Court addresses the petitioner.

The Petitioner provides testimony.

After reviewing the petition, hearing the testimony and there are no objections filed, The Court grants Petitioner's request for change of name and gender.

Petitioner is ordered to notify their probation officer. Petitioner shall notify the Chief of Police or Sheriff in the city they live in within 5 days.

Order Recognizing change of gender and sex identifier and for name change and for issuance of new certificates signed and filed this day.
